Name: m10_LightScatteringBank
Description: Determines the parameters for light scattering.

Fields.Name: Light Source: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal angle for the light source (sun). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light Source: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical angle for the light source (sun). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Distance Magnification %
Fields.Description: The magnification to apply to the distance of the scattering.

Fields.Name: Light Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the coloring for the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Light Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the coloring for the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Light Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the coloring for the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Light Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the coloring for the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Scattering Direction Coefficient
Fields.Description: The scattering direction coefficient, negative is backward, positive is forward.

Fields.Name: Rayleigh Scattering Coefficient
Fields.Description: The scattering coefficient for the rays. Represents air particles.

Fields.Name: Mie Scattering Coefficient
Fields.Description: The scattering coefficient for the rays. Represents fine particles.

Fields.Name: Scattering Degree
Fields.Description: The scattering degree for the rays.

Fields.Name: Reflected Light: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the coloring for the reflected light from the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Reflected Light: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the coloring for the reflected light from the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Reflected Light: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the coloring for the reflected light from the light source (sun).

Fields.Name: Reflected Light: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the coloring for the reflected light from the light source (sun).
